flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Fortis Institute-Towson fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (510 → 354).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Fortis Institute-Towson fell 28% between 2006 and 2009 (67.4% → 48.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 25 pp at Fortis Institute-Towson vs the 2003–2007 baseline (38.7% vs 63.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fortis Institute-Towson fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).
